Row.Text: Transform the late-game into technological transcendence.

Singularity replaces the Science Victory with a path to technological transcendence. Harvest Silicon, fabricate Chips, build Data Centers and Fusion Reactors, convert your civilization to inorganic life, and construct a Dyson Sphere to achieve victory. Requires Gathering Storm.
Silicon
A strategic resource found in deserts and coastal regions. Required for chip fabrication and the construction of advanced computing infrastructure.
Chips
A manufactured strategic resource produced by Chip Fab buildings in the Industrial Zone. Required for Data Centers and advanced computing infrastructure.
Chip Fab

Industrial Zone building. Fabricates basic Silicon chips for use in computing infrastructure. +2 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production. Produces 1 [ICON_RESOURCE_CHIPS] Chip per turn (requires improved [ICON_RESOURCE_SILICON] Silicon).
Advanced Chip Fab

Industrial Zone building. Produces cutting-edge processor designs using refined Silicon. Requires a Chip Fab. +3 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production, +1 [ICON_SCIENCE] Science. Produces an additional 2 [ICON_RESOURCE_CHIPS] Chips per turn (3 total, requires improved [ICON_RESOURCE_SILICON] Silicon).
Expert Chip Fab

Industrial Zone building. Manufactures chips at scale for domestic and interstellar use. Requires an Advanced Chip Fab. +4 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production, +2 [ICON_SCIENCE] Science. Produces an additional 2 [ICON_RESOURCE_CHIPS] Chips per turn (5 total, requires improved [ICON_RESOURCE_SILICON] Silicon).
AI Dividends
Commercial Hub building. AI-driven trading algorithms generate substantial revenue. +10 [ICON_GOLD] Gold.
Fusion Core
Activates the Fusion Reactor, converting [ICON_RESOURCE_URANIUM] Uranium into 16 [ICON_POWER] Power for this city and nearby cities within 6 tiles. +3 [ICON_SCIENCE] Science.
Fusion Reactor

A district that harnesses nuclear fusion to provide clean, abundant power. One per city. Caution: pillaging or natural disasters cause radiation fallout on surrounding tiles. +2 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production per adjacent Industrial Zone.
+{1_num} [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production from the adjacent {1_Num : plural 1?Industrial Zone; other?Industrial Zones;}
Microreactor

A compact nuclear fission reactor that provides 4 [ICON_POWER] Power to the city. +1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production, +1 [ICON_SCIENCE] Science. Caution: pillaging or natural disasters cause radiation fallout on this tile.
Chip Fabs Idle
Your Chip Fabs are not producing [ICON_RESOURCE_CHIPS] Chips because you have no improved [ICON_RESOURCE_SILICON] Silicon. Build a Mine on a Silicon deposit to resume production.
